name: webinar_registration_copy
description: Generate RMBC-structured webinar/VSL registration page copy — short, punchy, mobile-optimized registration pages for high-ticket funnels.

webinar_topic.description: What the webinar/VSL teaches or reveals.

target_audience.description: Who this is for — specific ICP with pain points.

key_outcome.description: The primary transformation or result promised.

presenter_name.description: Name and brief credential of the presenter.

traffic_source.description: One of: meta, native, organic, email, affiliate. Determines pre-sell level.
